title: CL-1001 — Home claim, burst kitchen pipe, water damage to ground floor
content: Customer: Margaret Chen (vulnerable — elderly, lives alone). Incident date: 2026-04-28 at 06:40. Cause of loss: a frozen kitchen mixer tap split overnight, releasing approximately 220 litres before the customer reached the stop-cock. Damage scope: kitchen vinyl flooring (full replacement), water-damaged kickboards on three lower cupboards, two damaged cookbooks, ceiling stain in the basement directly below. Emergency response: SES not required; Zava Insurance authorised same-day emergency plumbing under the policy's 24/7 make-safe benefit (capped at $500). Photos uploaded by the customer show standing water depth ~30mm and clear evidence of a split brass fitting. Reserve set at $14,800 pending Loss Adjuster inspection. Status: at Claims Assessment for coverage confirmation.
